title: EvangelionDEATHtrue Komm Susser Tod screenshot
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion:DEATH(true)²: Komm Susser Tod screenshot             Quote Post by gwern » Wed Jun 22, 2011 7:10 pm In http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/oldeva/1999-February/025652.html , Jamieson writes: I've been investigating this for a while now. I've been pretty sure that this scene was a direct result of Shinji's complementation and therefore never occured in reality. However, last night, I made a startling discovery. While watching "Evangelion EATH(true)²" (as I religously do, ya know :P) I noticed something very disturbing during the scene where Shinji first meets Kaworu on the beach. There is a very quick cut of Asuka flashed and looking at it now I am positive it is a view of Asuka from Shinji's perspective in the coffee-pot scene. The cut is of the camera looking down upon Asuka, sitting at the dinner table- head in hands- from her left. This would be exactly how Shinji would have seen her in the EoE scene. The whole thing seems very peculiar to me, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Wed Jun 22, 2011 7:58 pm I can confirm. I'm going to sleep ( at least four hours ) so I'm not gonna post any image, but there are two shots. The first one seems to be one of Misato, while the second is for sure of Asuka. The two shots together last less than a second... Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 22, 2011 8:13 pm It's supposed to be Asuka after the "Kaji's dead" scene which was also included in DC24 after being in Death. Asuka during "Kaji's dead": (Also in Episode DC24'. And speaking of, this DC scene also includes the knocked over coffee pot from EoE.) Then a few shots later when Shinji's at the lake before meeting Kaworu, we get: Misato mourning Kaji: Asuka mourning Kaji: (Which is one of the many "twisted retakes" EoE's Pre-Instrumentality and Instrumentality proper alludes to. Another being the Episode 15 kiss scene.)

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jun 22, 2011 10:11 pm :( Not seeing their faces makes them look even more sad. Also: Wow, this is my first time seeing these! Almost 10 years after first seeing the product. Always something new turning up every week or so, when I hang around here. Thanks for these, of course.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Thu Jun 23, 2011 2:25 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: It's supposed to be Asuka after the "Kaji's dead" scene which was also included in DC24 after being in Death.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 23, 2011 11:07 am BornIn1142 wrote: Really? Her clothes are different

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Jun 23, 2011 12:12 pm Thanks for the screenshots, SSD. You both make good points; I'm inclining to the idea that the scene is in fact in Instrumentality, and the mingling of various scene's clothes and cinematography is intended to bring together the multiple scenes into a single gestalt piece.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jun 26, 2011 12:14 pm BornIn1142 wrote: Really? Her clothes are different, and I have a hard time imagining her changing after hearing of it . I kind of figured she left the house pretty soon after that confrontation instead of just sitting around.

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Sun Jun 26, 2011 4:28 pm You know, it just occurred to me why the clothes in the Roman bath scene made me take it as a suicide scene - it seemed exactly like the stereotypical jump-off-the-roof scene where the jumper has carefully taken off their shoes and neatly arranged them on the roof. (And I seem to recall reading of the suicide wood by Mt. Fuji that the taking off shoes is also standard for hangings and the like.) Also: good point about the clothes. We see her mourning in real life in one set of clothes, she has another set of clothes at her bath, so regardless of whether the later scene is a true memory or Instrumentality encounter, she did change clothes.
